Notifications at 18 (up 1 from someone else posting in Car Detailing Business Owners group 20 min ago — not a lead). Checked USA Car Detailing Services post directly — 0 comments. Pressure Washing Business Owners post confirmed live. Activity log reviewed: no March 31 posts by Novaro yet. Messenger inbox unchanged: Brady Fellows, Byron Peabody, Anthony Cocchi (3d ago), Ann Giroux (unread E2EE, same as before) — no new DM threads. Note: Cheryl Provost (1d ago) and Ann Giroux (23h ago) accepted friend requests — tracked in prior runs. All totals unchanged: 113 comments, 38 positive, 2 DMs, 12 interest signals, 16 groups, 18 posts live. March 31 daily unchanged: 4 posts, 2 comments, 1 positive, 1 DM, 1 interest signal.
